## The friction

<!-- What slows you down today that Chardon could surface? Concrete beats abstract:
     "I re-run the same 4 commands after every rebase" is actionable, "better analytics"
     is not. -->

## What Chardon would do about it

<!-- A new detector? A new proposal kind? A change to an existing report? -->

## Scope check

Chardon is a **personal, local tool**: no server, no telemetry, no cross-team aggregation,
and deliberately not a productivity-surveillance tool. Requests that need a backend, a
shared dashboard, or reporting on someone else's activity are out of scope by design.

- [ ] This works with data already collected locally
- [ ] This needs new collection (say what, and why it is worth the per-tool-call cost)
